---
title:  
    "variant freq. dynamics of EXPIII"
date: 
    "July 15th, 2024"
author:  
    "Ali Movasati"  
output:  
    html_document:
        #css: style.css
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 2
        toc_float: true
        number_sections: true
        theme: lumen
        highlight: zenburn
        code_folding: hide
        code_download: true # to make the Rmd source code available
---




```{r loading libraries, echo=FALSE}

# loading libraries
library("ggplot2")
library("plotly")
library("gganimate")
library("DT")
library("dplyr")
library("tidyr")
library("Biostrings")
library("stringr")
library("purrr")
library("magrittr")
library("hrbrthemes")
library("RColorBrewer")
library("ggrepel")


```


```{r functions and operators}
`%notin%` <- Negate(`%in%`)
```



```{r read-in the data}

# determine the server path

if (file.exists("/home/amovas/")){
    print("Remote HPC Connection!")
    wd <- "/home/amovas/data/genome-evo-proj/"
} else {
    print("Local PC Connection!")
    wd <- "/Users/alimos313/Documents/studies/phd/hpc-research/genome-evo-proj/"
}

# load data
variants_ann <- read.table(file = paste0(wd, "results/tables/pipeline-outputs/all_annotated_variants.tsv.gz"), 
sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, header = TRUE)


# correct for the switched experimental lines
variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == 15 & variants_ann$passage > 360] <- "A"
variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == 16 & variants_ann$passage > 360] <- "B"

variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == "A"] <- "16"
variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == "B"] <- "15"


# only keep the EXPIII data
exp <- "EXPIII"
end_psg <- 500

variants_ann_expiii <- variants_ann %>% filter(exp_line %in% 13:16,
        passage <= end_psg) 

# facors

host_factor <- c("MT2", "MT4")
exp_line_factor <- c("MT-2_1", "MT-2_2", "MT-4_1", "MT-4_2")

translational_impacts <- c("U", "S", "N")
gene_factor <- c("gag", "pol", "vif", "vpr", "tat", "rev", "vpu", "envelope", "nef")
feature_factor <- c("5utr", "gag", "pol", "vif", "vpr", "tat1", "rev1", "vpu", "envelope", "tat2", "rev2", "nef", "3utr")

# format the dataframe
variants_ann_expiii <- variants_ann_expiii %>%
                            mutate(host_line = ifelse(exp_line %in% c("13", "14"), "MT2", "MT4"), # set host cell line info
                            exp_line = case_when(exp_line==13 ~ "MT-2_1", exp_line==14 ~ "MT-2_2", exp_line==15 ~ "MT-4_1", exp_line==16 ~ "MT-4_2"), # update exp line labels
                            mut_info = paste(genomic_pos, ref_allele, alt_allele, sep = "_")) %>% 
                            mutate(effect_simplified = case_when(effect == "synonymous_variant" ~ "S", effect == "untranslated_region" ~ "U")) %>%
                            mutate(effect_simplified = replace_na(effect_simplified, "N")) %>%
                            mutate(passage = as.factor(passage),
                            exp_line = factor(exp_line, levels = exp_line_factor),
                            host_line = factor(host_line, levels = host_factor),
                            effect_simplified = factor(effect_simplified, levels = translational_impacts)) 

# remove duplicate records for the same variants
variants_expiii <- variants_ann_expiii %>% filter(!duplicated(variant_id))


# Visual settings

line_palette <- c("#ff00ff", "#ff2400", "#6600cc", "#0000ff")
breaks_step <- 50
line_labels <- c("MT-2_1", "MT-2_2", "MT-4_1", "MT-4_2")


```





```{r set paramters}

# set parameters
category <- "Fixed"

if (category == "Sporadic"){
    min_threshold <- 0.01
    max_threshold <- 0.05
} else if (category == "Minority"){
    min_threshold <- 0.05
    max_threshold <- 0.5
} else if (category == "Majority"){
    min_threshold <- 0.5
    max_threshold <- 1.01
} else if (category == "Fixed"){
    min_threshold <- 0.99
    max_threshold <- 1.01
} else if (category == "All"){
    min_threshold <- 0.01
    max_threshold <- 1.01
}

```


```{r anime, results=TRUE}


variants_expiii_subset <- variants_expiii %>%   filter(allele_freq >= 0.01) %>%
                                                mutate(passage = as.numeric(as.character(passage)))



gg_fig <- ggplot(variants_expiii_subset, aes(x=allele_freq)) + 
    geom_histogram(aes(y=..count..),      # Histogram with density instead of count on y-axis
                binwidth=.01,
                colour="black", fill="white") +
    geom_density(aes(y = ..count.. * .01), alpha=.3, fill="#FF6666") +
    facet_wrap(~exp_line, ncol = 2) +
    transition_states(passage, transition_length = 1, state_length = 1, wrap = TRUE) + # to create animation 
    labs(title = "Variant Freq. Distribution \n(Transfer : {closest_state})", x = "Variant Freq.", y = "Count") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 25, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 20),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    strip.text.x = element_text(size = 25),
    legend.title = element_text(size=15),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.margin = unit(c(1,1,1,1), "cm"))


# save figure
date <- str_split(Sys.time(), pattern = " ")[[1]][1]
fig_dir <- paste0(wd, "results/figs/publication/expiii/provisional/", date, "/")
ifelse(!dir.exists(file.path(fig_dir)), dir.create(file.path(fig_dir)), FALSE)
anim_save(gg_fig, file = paste0(fig_dir, "allele-freq-accumulation3.gif"))



```



```{r Variant Frequency Trajectories, results=TRUE}



variants_expiii_subset <- variants_expiii %>%
                                mutate(mut_info_line = paste0(exp_line, "_", mut_info),
                                passage = as.numeric(as.character(passage)))



fixed_muts <- unique(variants_expiii_subset$mut_info_line[variants_expiii_subset$allele_freq >= 0.99])

tot_fixed_4lines <- length(fixed_muts)




s <- variants_expiii_subset %>% filter(mut_info_line %in% fixed_muts) %>% select(exp_line, mut_info) %>% distinct()


my_col_pal <- c(rep(c(brewer.pal(9,"Reds"),brewer.pal(9,"PuRd"))[9], length.out = sum(table(s$exp_line)[1:2])),
rep(c(brewer.pal(9,"Blues"),brewer.pal(9,"BuPu"))[9], length.out = sum(table(s$exp_line)[3:4])))


fig <- variants_expiii_subset[variants_expiii_subset$mut_info_line %in% fixed_muts,] %>% ggplot(aes(x = passage, y = allele_freq, group = mut_info_line, color = mut_info_line)) +
    geom_line() +
    facet_wrap(~exp_line, ncol = 1) +
    labs(title = "Variant Frequency Trajectories \n", y = "Frequency \n", x = "\n Transfer") +
    scale_color_manual(values = my_col_pal) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0,500, 50))+
    theme_bw() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 55, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 45),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 20, angle = 90),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 30),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size = 35, angle=0),
        legend.position="none")

fig



# save figure
date <- str_split(Sys.time(), pattern = " ")[[1]][1]
fig_dir <- paste0(wd, "results/figs/publication/expiii/provisional/", date, "/")
ifelse(!dir.exists(file.path(fig_dir)), dir.create(file.path(fig_dir)), FALSE)
pdf(file = paste0(fig_dir, "frequency_dynamics_",category,"_mutations.pdf"), height = 14, width = 14)
fig
dev.off()


table(variants_expiii$mut_info[variants_expiii$allele_freq >= 0.99 & variants_expiii$passage == end_psg])[table(variants_expiii$mut_info[variants_expiii$allele_freq >= 0.99 & variants_expiii$passage == end_psg]) == 4]
# 566_G_A  678_G_A 7854_A_G 
case <- c("566_G_A")

variants_expiii$tracking_group <- "No"
variants_expiii$tracking_group[variants_expiii$mut_info %in% case] <- "Yes"

variants_expiii_subset <- variants_expiii %>%
                                mutate(mut_info_line = paste0(exp_line, "_", mut_info),
                                passage = as.numeric(as.character(passage)))





fig <- variants_expiii_subset[variants_expiii_subset$mut_info_line %in% fixed_muts,] %>% ggplot(aes(x = passage, y = allele_freq, group = mut_info, color = mut_info_line, alpha = tracking_group)) +
    geom_line() +
    facet_wrap(~exp_line, ncol = 1) +
    scale_alpha_manual(values = c(0.1,1)) +
    labs(title = paste0(case, "\n"), y = "Frequency \n", x = "\n Transfer") +
    scale_color_manual(values = my_col_pal) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 55, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 45),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 20, angle = 90),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 30),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size = 35, angle=0),
        legend.position="none")

fig


# save figure
date <- str_split(Sys.time(), pattern = " ")[[1]][1]
fig_dir <- paste0(wd, "results/figs/publication/expiii/provisional/", date, "/")
ifelse(!dir.exists(file.path(fig_dir)), dir.create(file.path(fig_dir)), FALSE)
pdf(file = paste0(fig_dir, "frequency_dynamics_",case, ".pdf"), height = 14, width = 14)
fig
dev.off()


```


```{r linkage case}

# max(variants_expiii$allele_freq[variants_expiii$passage == 160 & variants_expiii$mut_info == "974_G_C" & variants_expiii$exp_line == "MT-2_1"])

variants_expiii_subset_mt21 <- variants_expiii_subset[variants_expiii_subset$mut_info_line %in% fixed_muts & variants_expiii_subset$exp_line == "MT-2_1",]





intersect(variants_expiii_subset_mt21$variant_info[variants_expiii_subset_mt21$passage == 270 & variants_expiii_subset_mt21$allele_freq >= 0.125],
variants_expiii_subset_mt21$variant_info[variants_expiii_subset_mt21$passage == 280 & variants_expiii_subset_mt21$allele_freq <= 0.14 ])


case <- c("972_G_A" , "973_G_A" , "974_G_C")

variants_expiii_subset_mt21$tracking_group <- "No"
variants_expiii_subset_mt21$tracking_group[variants_expiii_subset_mt21$mut_info %in% case] <- "Yes"

variants_expiii_subset_mt21[variants_expiii_subset_mt21$tracking_group == "Yes",]

variants_expiii_subset_mt21 <- variants_expiii_subset_mt21 %>%
                                mutate(mut_info_line = paste0(exp_line, "_", mut_info))



variants_expiii_subset_mt21$passage <- as.numeric(as.character(variants_expiii_subset_mt21$passage))

fig <- variants_expiii_subset_mt21[variants_expiii_subset_mt21$mut_info_line %in% fixed_muts,] %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = passage, y = allele_freq, group = mut_info, color = mut_info_line, alpha = tracking_group)) +
    geom_line() +
    facet_wrap(~exp_line, ncol = 1) +
    scale_alpha_manual(values = c(0.1,1)) +
    labs(title = "", y = "Frequency \n", x = "\n Transfer") +
    scale_color_manual(values = my_col_pal) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 55, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 45),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 20, angle = 90),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 30),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size = 35, angle=0),
        legend.position="none")

ggplotly(fig)

fig <- fig + geom_text_repel(
    data = . %>% filter(tracking_group == "Yes" & passage == 180),
    aes(label = mut_info),
    size = 10,       # Adjust label text size
    color = "black" # Optional: set label color
)





# save figure
date <- str_split(Sys.time(), pattern = " ")[[1]][1]
fig_dir <- paste0(wd, "results/figs/publication/expiii/provisional/", date, "/")
ifelse(!dir.exists(file.path(fig_dir)), dir.create(file.path(fig_dir)), FALSE)
pdf(file = paste0(fig_dir, "frequency_dynamics_linkage_cases.pdf"), height = 14, width = 14)
fig
dev.off()

```
